I

InAppNotification - Class in com.example.eventlottery
This class models one in-app notification row in users/{deviceId}/notifications, written by NotificationHelper when organizers notify entrants.
InAppNotification() - Constructor for class com.example.eventlottery.InAppNotification
No-arg constructor for Firestore-style construction.
InvitationInitialFragment - Class in com.example.eventlottery
 
InvitationInitialFragment() - Constructor for class com.example.eventlottery.InvitationInitialFragment
 
InvitationResponseFragment - Class in com.example.eventlottery
 
InvitationResponseFragment() - Constructor for class com.example.eventlottery.InvitationResponseFragment
 
INVITED - Enum constant in enum class com.example.eventlottery.WaitingListEntry.Status
 
isCoOrganizer(String) - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.Event
Returns whether the given device id is listed as a co-organizer.
isGeolocationRequired() - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.Event
Returns whether entrants must provide geolocation when joining.
isLoadedEventIsPrivate() - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.EventDetailsActivity
Returns whether the currently loaded event is a private (invite-only) event.
isNotificationsEnabled() - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.Entrant
Returns whether push/in-app notifications are enabled for this entrant.
isNotificationsEnabled() - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.Organizer
Returns whether organizer notifications are enabled.
isPrivate() - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.Event
Returns whether this is a private event (US 02.01.02).
isRead() - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.InAppNotification
Returns whether the user has marked this notification as read.
isRegistrationOpen() - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.Event
Returns whether the current time is within the registration window (inclusive).
isRegistrationOpenOnly() - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.EventFilterCriteria
Returns whether only events with open registration should appear (list screen).
isTouchExplorationEnabled(Context) - Static method in class com.example.eventlottery.AccessibilityUtils
Returns true when the user has an accessibility service with touch exploration active.
